message:
feat(conformance): add EMLINK limit test for hard link rejection

Add a new test `write_link_rejected_at_emlink_limit` that verifies
the filesystem returns EMLINK when attempting to create a hard link
on an inode whose links_count has already reached the ext4 maximum
of 65,000. The test creates a source file, persists an artificially
elevated nlink via `write_inode`, then asserts that `fs.link()` fails
with `libc::EMLINK`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
